card.title: Early Word
card.disclaimer: Unofficial social chatter shown as an EARLY signal only. It never changes a prediction and is not a confirmed availability call -- always defer to the official availability tile.
card.empty_note: No fresh, confident social lead for tonight's slate teams inside the gameday window. Nothing to show is the normal state.
card.visual_note: Render distinct from the official availability tile (e.g. a light 'rumor' styling); each row links out to the source post.
